pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified reentrancy risks from external calls in withdrawal functions before state updates. SWC-107 fits as arithmetic operations lack overflow checks despite using a safe math library, indicating inconsistent safeguards. Evidence: External calls in playerWithdrawPendingTransactions before balance zeroing (Finding 3); Inconsistent use of DSSafeAddSub library per audit task (Finding 9); Unchecked calculations in betIsValid and setMaxProfit (Finding 10)

raw.pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified reentrancy risks from external calls in withdrawal functions before state updates. SWC-107 fits as arithmetic operations lack overflow checks despite using a safe math library, indicating inconsistent safeguards. Evidence: External calls in playerWithdrawPendingTransactions before balance zeroing (Finding 3); Inconsistent use of DSSafeAddSub library per audit task (Finding 9); Unchecked calculations in betIsValid and setMaxProfit (Finding 10)
